since_last: 87% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +3.75%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 87% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.69% · Gold -1.26% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 87% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +3.75%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +3.75%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.50%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +8.70%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.70%, CEVA +7.88%, ARM +4.82%, AMAT +4.65%, MU +4.57%. Laggards: FTNT -0.96%, BABA -0.89%, DV -0.68%, AES -0.41%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.53% at $192.84
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.53% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
